cmd.capper.disabled: Huge-result capper disabled. Lookup tool remains registered until session reload. Config: {path}
cmd.capper.enabled: Huge-result capper enabled. Warning: enabling lookup tool mid-session can cause one cache-miss turn. Config: {path}
cmd.config.title: Context cache config
cmd.description: Context cache diagnostics and long-session recommendations
cmd.diagnose.description: Show detailed cache, provider, and context diagnostics
cmd.hold.done: Context cache hold set for {turns} turns.
context.compact: Context is near compaction threshold. Choose /context-engine fold, compact, or hold.
context.danger: Context is getting large. Avoid broad tool calls; fold or hold deliberately.
context.unavailable: Context usage is unavailable. No recommendation can be made yet.
context.warn: Context is growing. Keep prefix/tools stable for 99% cache hit.
engine.appendOnly.invalidated: AppendOnly projection invalidated; falling back to host context
engine.foldExitSummary: Context critically high — forcing aggressive fold to prevent overflow.
engine.foldFallback: Semantic fold skipped: {reason}. Using native compaction.
engine.foldPreflight: Pre-flight fold triggered at turn start — context above 90%.
engine.foldSemanticTriggered: Semantic fold completed — history summarized with prefix cache tail preserved.
engine.historyRewritten: ⚠ Conversation history rewritten — prefix cache likely invalidated
engine.notify.choice: ▌ Context {pct} · hit {hit} · {turns} turns to overflow. Saved ${saved}; compact miss cost ~${compact}. Options: [1] /context-engine fold, [2] compact, [3] hold.
engine.notify.cooldown: Auto fold skipped: compaction cooldown active.
engine.prefixChanged: ⚠ Cache prefix changed — next request may be cache miss
engine.prefixChangedReason: Cache prefix changed ({reason}) — next request likely cache miss
engine.prune.busy: Tool pruning in progress, will complete soon.
engine.prune.enabled: Tool pruning active — summarized tool results will be pruned from context.
engine.recommend.advise: Orange zone: review context pressure; hold, prune, or fold depending on tool-result growth.
engine.recommend.adviseCompact: Compact is acceptable — hit rate is already low.
engine.recommend.fold: Fold now — red zone or weak hit rate.
engine.recommend.hold: Hold — hit rate is high and overflow is not immediate.
engine.tool.duplicate: Duplicate tool call suppressed to avoid cache/context churn
engine.tool.invalidArgs: Invalid tool arguments; retry with valid schema
engine.tool.textualMissing: Model described a tool call but did not emit provider tool_calls; ask it to retry with a real tool call.
payload.reasoningMissing: {count} assistant message(s) missing reasoning_content in serialized payload
payload.reasoningOk: all assistant messages include reasoning_content when present in payload
payload.runTurn: Run a model turn, then use /context-engine diagnose again.
payload.title: Last provider request
status.eligible99: 99% possible: Reasonix invariants stable; observed warm hit {hit}
status.hashLine: Prefix hash: {prefixHash} · tool hash: {toolHash} · tool changes {tools} · last reason: {reason}
status.misconfigured: Looks like cache is supported, but Pi compatibility metadata is incomplete.
status.noCompletedUsage: No completed model requests with usage data yet.
status.notDeepSeek: This is not a prompt-cached model; status-line cache display stays hidden.
status.pruneDetails: Prune: mode {mode} · cleanups {done} · summarized {summarized} calls · applied {applied} · not applied yet {unapplied} · pending {pending} calls in {batches} batches · next {next} · progress {progress}
status.pruneMissImpact: Post-prune miss impact: {requests} requests · miss {miss} · cache {cache} · ${cost} total · ${last} last · hit {hit}
status.prunePreservedDuringFlush: Preserved during flush: {batches} batches · {tools} tool calls · last {lastBatches}/{lastTools}
status.pruneRebuildImpact: Rebuild: {source} -> {output} messages · prunable {prunable} · applied {applied} · saved ~{saved} · checkpoint {checkpoint} · {reason}
status.pruneSummaryImpact: Prune summary cost: {requests} requests · {tokens} tokens · ${cost} total · ${last} last
status.title: Context cache
tool.checkpoint.description: Create a named checkpoint in conversation history.
tool.checkpoint.error.alreadyExists: Checkpoint '{name}' already exists at {id}. Use a different name.
tool.checkpoint.label: Context Checkpoint
tool.checkpoint.longDescription: Create a named checkpoint in conversation history. Use before risky work or at stable milestones.
tool.checkpoint.param.name: Checkpoint name. Use meaningful names like 'before-refactor'.
tool.checkpoint.param.target: Optional entry ID or checkpoint name to label. Defaults to current position.
tool.fold.description: Fold old conversation history into a summary. Call when context is above 75%.
tool.fold.label: Context cache fold
tool.fold.promptSnippet: Fold old conversation history when context is high to preserve cache utility.
tool.fold.triggered: History fold triggered. Prefix cache tail preserved.
tool.lookup.description: Retrieve full tool output elided by pi-context-engine huge-result capper.
tool.lookup.label: context result lookup
tool.lookup.param.limit: Maximum number of characters to return.
tool.lookup.param.offset: Start character offset within the stored result.
tool.lookup.promptSnippet: Retrieve full tool output elided by pi-context-engine huge-result capper.
tool.parallelRead.description: Read multiple workspace files in parallel and return ordered results.
tool.parallelRead.label: Parallel file read
tool.parallelRead.promptSnippet: Use for read-only multi-file inspection when many files are needed.
tool.pin.description: Pin a priority fact, user decision, project invariant, or working rule that must survive context pruning/folding.
tool.pin.label: Context Pin
tool.pin.param.content: The exact rule, fact, or decision to preserve.
tool.pin.param.kind: Pin kind: priority, user-memory, project-memory, working-rule.
tool.pin.param.name: Short stable name for this pin (e.g. 'no-legacy-context-tag').
tool.pinSkill.description: Load a skill body as an active pinned block. The full skill instructions will be preserved across semantic folds.
tool.pinSkill.label: Pin Skill
tool.pinSkill.param.arguments: Optional task-specific arguments for the skill.
tool.pinSkill.param.name: Skill name to load and pin.
tool.prune.description: Summarize and prune tool call results to free context.
tool.prune.diagnostics: Prune diagnostics: reason={reason} · attempted={attempted} · batches={batches} · summary requests={requests} · model={model}
tool.prune.io: Summarizer IO: raw={raw} chars · summary={summary} chars · prompt={prompt} chars · response={response} chars · accepted={accepted}
tool.prune.label: Prune Tool Calls
tool.prune.longDescription: Summarize and prune verbose tool call results from context to free space.
tool.prune.noneFoundDetails: Scan: seen {seen} tool calls · summarized {summarized} · applied {applied} · skipped {skipped} · unhandled {unhandled}.
tool.prune.noneSummarized: No tool calls could be summarized.
tool.prune.param.mode: Pruning mode. 'auto' summarizes all pending tool calls (default). 'interactive' returns them for review.
tool.prune.summarized: Summarized and marked {count} tool calls for pruning.
tool.rewind.description: Return to an earlier checkpoint and start a fresh continuation.
tool.rewind.label: Conversation Rewind
tool.rewind.longDescription: Return to an earlier checkpoint and start a fresh continuation with a carryover summary.
tool.rewind.notify.label: Rewound to {target}
tool.rewind.param.backupCheckpoint: Optional checkpoint name for current state before rewinding.
tool.rewind.param.message: Carryover summary: current progress, important changes, and next step.
tool.rewind.param.target: Checkpoint name or entry ID to rewind to. Becomes the new root for continuation.
tool.timeline.description: Show session history as an ASCII tree with checkpoint labels.
tool.timeline.head: HEAD
tool.timeline.label: Context Timeline
tool.timeline.longDescription: Show session history as an ASCII tree with checkpoint labels, cache checkpoint markers, and context usage HUD.
tool.timeline.param.verbose: Show all messages including collapsed tool calls (default: false).
ui.dashboard.cacheDeltaHelp: Net saved subtracts prune summary requests and the measured post-prune cache miss impact.
ui.dashboard.description: Show context usage and cache stats
ui.dashboard.mixedSession: Mixed session: {models} models, {checkpoints} checkpoints. Costs per-request by model.
ui.dashboard.prefixChangedHelp: Prefix changed: the next provider request can miss the prompt cache.
ui.dashboard.prefixStableHelp: Prefix is stable: the next provider request should reuse the warm prompt cache.
ui.dashboard.pruneMissImpact: post-prune miss {requests} req · miss {miss} · cache {cache} · cost {cost} · last {last} · hit {hit}
ui.dashboard.prunePreservedDuringFlush: preserved during flush {batches} batches · {tools} tools · last {lastBatches}/{lastTools}
ui.dashboard.pruneRebuildImpact: rebuild {source}->{output} msgs · prunable {prunable} · applied {applied} · saved ~{saved} · checkpoint {checkpoint}
ui.dashboard.title: Context Usage
ui.dashboard.toolsChangedHelp: Tool set changed: provider cache may be rebuilt for the next turn.
ui.dashboard.toolsStableHelp: Tool set is stable: tool definitions are not invalidating the cache prefix.
ui.settings.aggressiveFoldThreshold.help: Context level where the engine can use stronger folding to prevent overflow.
ui.settings.autoDetectSkillPins.help: Detect /skill:name usage and suggest pinning after repeated invocations.
ui.settings.autoFold.help: Let the engine fold old conversation history automatically when context pressure is high.
ui.settings.contextForceFoldPct.help: Critical context level where folding is forced to protect the session.
ui.settings.diagnostics.help: Record provider payload diagnostics for troubleshooting cache behavior.
ui.settings.foldThreshold.help: Context level where semantic folding becomes recommended.
ui.settings.memoryInjection.help: Inject user/project memory blocks as a stable system-prompt section. Off by default — can introduce stale authority.
ui.settings.priorityInjection.help: Inject high-priority pinned rules and decisions as a stable system-prompt section.
ui.settings.pruneBatchSize.help: How many assistant responses with tool activity to collect before one batched prune request. Range: 1-20.
ui.settings.pruneEnabled.help: Allow summarized tool results to be removed from active context.
ui.settings.pruneModel.help: Fast model used to summarize old tool results before they are removed from context.
ui.settings.pruneOn.help: When to summarize and replace tool results: after agent text, checkpoint, manual, agent-driven, or every response.
ui.settings.skillPinning.help: Wrap loaded skill bodies in context-engine-pin markers so they survive semantic folds.
ui.settings.statusBarStyle.help: How the one-line cache indicator is rendered in the terminal status area.
ui.settings.title: Engine Settings
